Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Debian-based Maven/JDK 11 image to an Alpine-based Liberica JDK 21 image to align with the Java 21 migration.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 features and Spring Boot 3 compatibility; the old JDK 11 image is incompatible with the target runtime requirements.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian package management (apt-get) with Alpine package management (apk) for installing system dependencies.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not support apt-get; using apt-get would result in a build failure.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update Node.js installation from NodeSource setup script for Node 12 to NVM installation for Node 16.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Node 12 is end-of-life and incompatible with modern build tools; the old installation method is removed in favor of a version manager compatible with the new environment.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add Maven installation via apk since the new base image does not include Maven by default.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process requires Maven to compile the project; the new base image lacks Maven, causing build failure if not installed.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add libstdc++ dependency required for native libraries or specific Java components on Alpine.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Some Java native libraries or dependencies may require libstdc++ on Alpine Linux; missing it could cause runtime linkage errors.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the copy strategy to include the entire directory (including .git) to support git-based configuration.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application or build process relies on git metadata (e.g., for versioning or dokku settings); excluding .git would break this functionality.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add explicit Maven build step to compile the application during image build.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous image likely relied on a pre-built artifact or a different build strategy; the new setup requires explicit compilation to produce the JAR.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the entrypoint from a generic bash shell to running the compiled JAR file.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container must start the application; the previous CMD was likely for debugging or interactive use, while the new ENTRYPOINT ensures the app runs automatically.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.3 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6 APIs required for modern development.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 17 settings on a Java 21 project may miss new language features or fail if strict source/target checks are enabled in the compiler plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade spring-cloud-gateway-mvc from 3.0.1 to 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x (compatible with Boot 2.6) is incompatible with Spring Boot 3; version 4.1.3 is required for Spring Boot 3.3 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated springfox-boot-starter with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui for API documentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 and Spring Framework 6 due to changes in the Servlet API and Spring MVC internals; it will fail to compile or start.
